title: MEN LOVE These 4 Texts From Women! (How To Text Guys) | Matthew Hussey
text: I'm not sure how long this video is going to be up, so watch it right now while you can. I'm sure this is going to offend a few men, but ladies, I do not care. Instead, I just want you to say this, a, that's so sweet. Thank you, and then a smiley face. Take the validation, enjoy it, be sweet and humble with it, but do not give him back what he's asking for in this miniature moment of investment. Annoying text number two, the back from the dead text. This is when a guy who hasn't messaged you in weeks all of a sudden sends you a message like this. Hey, I've been thinking about you.
